signal.description: Continuous vision-driven loop pauses after run completion instead of auto-chaining. Operator must manually restart with agentxchain run --continuous after every PM-Dev-QA cycle. The loop should: complete run, check VISION.md for remaining scope, derive next roadmap item, start new run automatically. Currently requires operator intervention every 20-40 minutes.

evidence.value: Observed across runs 7-9: continuous session cont-370dd13e pauses at run completion. tusq.dev also reported same issue (intent_1777690223477_26ff, suppressed as stale). The --continuous --vision flags exist but the run-loop exits or pauses instead of chaining.
